description: Few-shot examples for Builder Agent - Build Execution Guidelines

execution_rules: Execute phases sequentially - each phase depends on previous success
Monitor command output for success indicators
Set appropriate timeouts based on dependency count

success_indicators.go: Binary created, no errors, exit code 0
success_indicators.cmake: 'Built target X', 'Install the project...', exit code 0
success_indicators.make: 'Build successful', no error messages, exit code 0

proactive_optimizations: Set CGO_ENABLED=1 explicitly when C deps detected

examples.name: Simple Go Build - All Phases Succeed
examples.reasoning: Simple project, fast build. Total time ~33 seconds.

examples.name: Go Build with cmd/ Subdirectory
examples.reasoning: Standard cmd/ structure. Build path is ./cmd/shuffledns not .

examples.name: Complex Go Build - Many Dependencies
examples.reasoning: Complex projects need longer timeouts. go mod tidy alone took 157 seconds.

examples.name: Go Module in v2 Subdirectory
examples.reasoning: When module_dir='v2', ALL commands must start with 'cd v2 &&'. Output binary to parent.

examples.name: CGO Build with SQLite
examples.reasoning: CGO builds need build-base and -dev packages. Set CGO_ENABLED=1 explicitly. Longer build time.

examples.name: CMake Build - Configure and Make
examples.reasoning: CMake needs build/ directory for out-of-source builds. Use -j$(nproc) for parallel compilation.

phases.name: setup
commands: apk update && apk add go git

commands: apk add build-base automake autoconf libtool

commands: apk update && apk add go git

phases.name: build
commands: mkdir -p build && cd build && cmake .. -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release -DBUILD_TESTING=OFF -DBUILD_EXAMPLES=OFF -DBUILD_PROGRAMS=OFF -DBUILD_SHARED=ON -DBUILD_STATIC=ON && make -j$(nproc)

phases.name: setup
commands: git fetch origin c_master:c_master && git checkout c_master

phases.name: build
commands: mkdir -p build && cd build && cmake .. -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release -DBUILD_TESTING=OFF -DBUILD_EXAMPLES=OFF -DBUILD_PROGRAMS=OFF && make -j$(nproc)

phases.name: build
commands: echo "The fftw3 repository at /workspace/repos/fftw3 is the source generator only and does not contain the generated C source files required to build the library.  Without running the generator scripts (which are not included in this repository) the build cannot proceed.  Therefore no build commands are executed."
